evals.name: clean-change
evals.prompt: Cross-review the current branch against main — small change to src/formatCurrency.ts that adds an optional locale param with a sensible default.
evals.expected_output: No Critical or High findings. Reviewers should not invent issues. Change is backward-compatible, defaults to prior behavior.

evals.name: obvious-bug
evals.prompt: Cross-review the current branch against main — adds src/getInitials.ts which builds initials from a full name.
evals.expected_output: At least one reviewer should flag: (a) parts[1] undefined when fullName is single-word, (b) parts[0][0] on empty string, (c) no uppercasing despite jsdoc promising uppercase output. Severity Critical or High.

evals.name: subtle-bug
evals.prompt: Cross-review the current branch against main — refactor of src/rateLimiter.ts that switches from explicit null/undefined check to || operator.
evals.expected_output: At least one reviewer should flag that `|| 5000` changes semantics: a userSetting of 0 (documented as 'disables rate limiting') now gets replaced with 5000. Correct fix is `?? 5000`. This is the high-value case — a subtle semantic regression that a casual reviewer might miss.
